subLocations.name: Dream Zanarkand
subLocations.prose: You're at a blitzball match — stop and talk to the two women and the kids near Tidus's residence; one of them gives you two Potions for promising a ticket. The match itself is scripted: enjoy it, then follow Auron when Sin hits. The Sinspawn Ammes fight at the stadium is your first real combat — Auron's Overdrive fires automatically, then you finish it off.

bosses.strategy: Both Tidus and Auron begin this fight with their Overdrive gauges nearly full — Sinspawn Ammes's first attack pushes Auron's gauge over the edge. Use Auron's Bushido (Dragon Fang) immediately, then execute Tidus's Swordplay Overdrive when the gauge fills. Ammes only casts Demi, which reduces HP by a percentage and can never actually kill you, so there's no danger — finish it off with normal attacks after both Overdrives land.
